lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT customer_id, rating, comments FROM customer_feedback WHERE rating >= 4 LIMIT 5;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql: SELECT customer_id, rating, comments FROM customer_feedback WHERE rating >= 4 LIMIT 5;

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT status, SUM(amount_owed) AS total_owed FROM tax_records WHERE tax_year = 2023 AND status IN ('unpaid', 'pending') GROUP BY status ORDER BY status DESC, total_owed ASC;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql:
SELECT status, SUM(amount_owed) AS total_amount_owed
FROM tax_records
WHERE tax_year = 2023 AND status IN ('unpaid', 'pending')
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY status DESC, total_amount_owed ASC

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: UPDATE media_submissions AS ms SET status = 'approved' WHERE ms.submission_type = 'article' AND ms.word_count > 1000 AND ms.reviewed = false;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql: UPDATE media_submissions SET status = 'approved' WHERE submission_type = 'article' AND word_count > 1000 AND reviewed = 0;

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT warehouse_zone, transaction_type, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity FROM inventory_transactions WHERE (transaction_date >= '2023-01-01' AND transaction_type = 'outgoing') OR (transaction_date < '2023-01-01' AND quantity > 100) GROUP BY warehouse_zone, transaction_type HAVING SUM(quantity) > 500 ORDER BY warehouse_zone ASC, total_quantity DESC;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql:
SELECT warehouse_zone, transaction_type, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM inventory_transactions
WHERE (transaction_date >= '2023-01-01' AND transaction_type = 'outgoing')
OR (transaction_date < '2023-01-01' AND quantity > 100)
GROUP BY warehouse_zone, transaction_type
HAVING SUM(quantity) > 500
ORDER BY warehouse_zone ASC, SUM(quantity) DESC

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT region, SUM(total_deposits) AS total_deposits_sum FROM branch_performance GROUP BY region HAVING SUM(total_deposits) > 1000000 AND AVG(average_loan) < 50000 LIMIT 5;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql:
SELECT region, SUM(total_deposits) AS total_deposits_sum
FROM branch_performance
GROUP BY region
HAVING SUM(total_deposits) > 1000000 AND AVG(average_loan) < 50000
LIMIT 5;

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT region, SUM(data_usage) AS total_data, AVG(call_duration) AS avg_call FROM customer_usage GROUP BY region HAVING SUM(data_usage) > 1000 AND AVG(call_duration) < 300 LIMIT 5 OFFSET 2;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql:
SELECT region, SUM(data_usage) AS total_data_usage, AVG(call_duration) AS avg_call_duration
FROM customer_usage
GROUP BY region
HAVING SUM(data_usage) > 1000 AND AVG(call_duration) < 300
ORDER BY region
LIMIT 5 OFFSET 2;

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT movie_title AS title, SUM(quantity) AS total_sold, AVG(price) AS avg_price FROM ticket_sales GROUP BY movie_title HAVING SUM(quantity) > 100 AND AVG(price) < 20 ORDER BY total_sold DESC, avg_price DESC;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql: SELECT movie_title AS title, SUM(quantity) AS total_sold, AVG(price) AS avg_price FROM ticket_sales GROUP BY movie_title HAVING SUM(quantity) > 100 AND AVG(price) < 20 ORDER BY total_sold DESC, avg_price DESC;

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: UPDATE travel_destinations SET average_cost = 1200 WHERE country = 'France' AND popularity_rating > 4;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql: UPDATE travel_destinations SET average_cost = 1200 WHERE country = 'France' AND popularity_rating > 4;

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT order_id, customer_id, total_price FROM order_history WHERE status = 'delivered' ORDER BY total_price DESC, order_date ASC;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql: SELECT order_id, customer_id, total_price FROM order_history WHERE status = 'delivered' ORDER BY total_price DESC, order_date ASC;

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT traveler_name, destination_city, start_date, end_date FROM travel_itineraries ORDER BY start_date DESC, end_date DESC;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql: SELECT traveler_name, destination_city, start_date, end_date FROM travel_itineraries ORDER BY start_date DESC, end_date DESC;

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: UPDATE supplier_deliveries AS s SET status = 'Reviewed' WHERE s.supplier_id IN (SELECT supplier_id FROM (SELECT supplier_id FROM supplier_deliveries WHERE delivery_date < '2023-06-01') AS tmp) AND s.quantity > (SELECT AVG(quantity) FROM (SELECT quantity FROM supplier_deliveries) AS avg_query);
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql:
UPDATE supplier_deliveries
SET status = 'Reviewed'
WHERE supplier_id IN (
SELECT DISTINCT supplier_id
FROM supplier_deliveries
WHERE delivery_date < '2023-06-01'
)
AND quantity > (SELECT AVG(quantity) FROM supplier_deliveries);

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT vet_id, AVG(weight_kg) AS avg_weight, COUNT(*) AS total_visits FROM patient_visits GROUP BY vet_id HAVING AVG(weight_kg) > 20 AND COUNT(*) > 5 LIMIT 10;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql:
SELECT vet_id, AVG(weight_kg) AS avg_weight, COUNT(*) AS total_visits
FROM patient_visits
GROUP BY vet_id
HAVING AVG(weight_kg) > 20 AND COUNT(*) > 5
LIMIT 10

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT owner_name, total_spent FROM pet_owners WHERE total_spent > (SELECT AVG(total_spent) FROM pet_owners);
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql:
SELECT owner_name, total_spent
FROM pet_owners
WHERE total_spent > (SELECT AVG(total_spent) FROM pet_owners)
ORDER BY owner_name;

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT customer_name, seat_number FROM game_tickets WHERE price > (SELECT AVG(price) FROM game_tickets) AND price < (SELECT MAX(price) FROM game_tickets) ORDER BY seat_number ASC;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql:
SELECT customer_name, seat_number
FROM game_tickets
WHERE price > (SELECT AVG(price) FROM game_tickets)
AND price < (SELECT MAX(price) FROM game_tickets)
ORDER BY seat_number ASC;

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT status, AVG(votes) AS avg_votes, COUNT(*) AS request_count FROM feature_requests GROUP BY status HAVING AVG(votes) > 20 AND COUNT(*) >= 8 ORDER BY status DESC, request_count DESC LIMIT 5;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql:
SELECT status, AVG(votes) AS average_votes, COUNT(*) AS request_count
FROM feature_requests
GROUP BY status
HAVING AVG(votes) > 20 AND COUNT(*) >= 8
ORDER BY status DESC, request_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT make,model,AVG(price_per_day) AS avg_price FROM vehicle_inventory GROUP BY make,model HAVING AVG(price_per_day)>50 AND COUNT(*)>5 ORDER BY make ASC,avg_price DESC LIMIT 10;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql:
SELECT make, model, AVG(price_per_day) AS avg_price
FROM vehicle_inventory
GROUP BY make, model
HAVING AVG(price_per_day) > 50 AND COUNT(*) > 5
ORDER BY make ASC, avg_price DESC
LIMIT 10;

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT cs.location AS loc, cs.status AS st, AVG(cs.budget) AS avg_budget, COUNT(cs.project_id) AS total_projects FROM construction_site AS cs GROUP BY cs.location, cs.status HAVING AVG(cs.budget) > 100000 AND COUNT(cs.project_id) >= 5;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql:
SELECT location, status, AVG(budget) AS avg_budget, COUNT(*) AS total_projects
FROM construction_site
GROUP BY location, status
HAVING AVG(budget) > 100000 AND COUNT(*) >= 5;

lifelong_agentbench.expected_sql: SELECT event_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating FROM event_feedback GROUP BY event_id ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;
lifelong_agentbench.got_sql:
SELECT event_id, AVG(rating) AS avg_rating
FROM event_feedback
GROUP BY event_id
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;
